title: EVO-STIK Wood Glue 500ml - Interior - Extra Strong - Fast Setting Glue - Dries Clear - Suitable for All Wood Types
features: Water-based, fast setting and extra strong adhesive that forms a bond stronger than the wood itself
Adhesive dries to a clear finish and is suitable for the general bonding of all types of wood including hardwood, softwood, MDF, ply and chipboard
Suitable for the assembly of frames for doors, windows and drawers, as well as making mortice and tenon, dowelled and other standard woodworking joints. Complies with EN204 type D7
Also suitable for bonding wood veneers and laminated plastics to wood or chipboard cores. Strong wood glue for furniture assembly
CONTENTS: 1x EVO-STIK Wood Glue - For interior use, 500ml
description: From the manufacturer EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Interior Water-based wood adhesive for interior use EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Interior is a fast setting, extra strong adhesive that forms a bond stronger than the wood itself! Suitable for internal use on all wood types, the adhesive is non-flammable and dries to a clear, translucent finish. EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Interior may be used for the assembly of frames for doors, windows, drawers and many other applications. In addition, it is suitable for making mortice and tenon, dowelled, and other standard woodworking joints. Suitable use & materials EVO-STIK Wood Glue - Interior may be used for the assembly of frames for doors, windows, drawers, etc. It is suitable for making mortice and tenon, dowelled, and other standard woodworking joints, as well as bonding wood veneers and laminated plastics to wood or chipboard cores. It may also be used for bonding rigid PVC or aluminium edge trim sections to recessed wood for internal use.
